title: Classic Blue Embroidery Scissors, Stainless Steel, 1pcs with Fake Leather Cover
features: ⭐ Multiuse Scissors: One scissors can meet for various demands. Great for embroidery, sewing, thread cutting, diy craft etc. It is made of quality stainless steel, easy to cut, sturdy and long lasting to use.
⭐ Small Scissors: Size of the needlework scissors is about 9.1x4.7x0.3cm/3.58x1.85x0.12 inch, appropriate size for sewing work. Easy to store and portable to carry, brings more convenience.
⭐ Scissors with Cover: Each scissors is matched with a artificial PU leather protective case, helpful to avoid scratching and prevent accidental hurt.
⭐ Vintage Scissors: Craft cutting scissors are with classic and exquisite patterns, looks pretty. Comes a beautiful blue color. Colored scissors make sewing process more interesting.

⭐ Warm Tip: 1. The handicraft scissors has sharp point, please keep the sewing scissors in a safe place to prevent children from playing. 2. Because of different shooting angle and light, the color maybe slightly different from the picture.
description: Product Description It is an essential for embroidery and sewing. Small and exquisite scissors with cover. Has sophisticated pattern, in vivid color, looks brilliant, adding fun to the craft work. Made of fine stainless steel, the scissors with sharp cutiting is easy to operate. Coming with faux leather cover, can store scissors better. Meanwhile prevent scratching. Safe to store and carry. Multipurpose Scissors Ideal for diy craft making, embroidery, needlework, fabric, threads or paper cutting etc. Specification 1. Material: Stainless steel 2. Color:Blue 3. Size: About 9.1x4.7x0.3cm/3.58x1.85x0.12 inch 4. Package: 1 * small embroidery scissors, 1 * Fake PU leather scissors sheath Please Note The sewing scissors is small. Sharp pointed scissors, please keep away from children. Color maybe slightly different from the picture, because of different shooting angle and light.
